summary: v107 named the exact-acyclic isoClosure strict-realization input and connected it to `IsTriangulated`, isoClosure `trW` left/right calculus, triangulation compatibility, and ordinary homotopy Verdier quotient structures. Product remains nonterminal because the strict realizations are not constructed from arbitrary endpoints, boundedHomotopyObject closure is not proved unconditionally, left/right calculus is not unconditional, ordinary triangulated structure is not transferred to `Dbounded`, and no stable infinity-category structure is constructed.
